messages.content: can't sleep, brain's just buzzing. you up?

Still here. 1 a.m. with a buzzing brain is its own kind of alone.

What's circling?
had way too much coffee at like 4pm, rookie mistake. now i'm wired

That 4 p.m. coffee has a way of collecting its debt right when you want to rest.

Is it purely the caffeine keeping you up, or is there something the buzz is latching onto?
kinda nice though, the apartment's all quiet and i'm just messing around on my phone

There's something real about that — the world gone quiet and the night feeling like it belongs to you.

What does your brain tend to do with that kind of space?
i've got my buddy sam coming over tomorrow to watch the game so i should really try to sleep soon
That's a good reason to wind down. The quiet night will keep — Sam and the game are worth showing up rested for.
alright i'm gonna put the phone down and try counting backwards or whatever. night
Good call. Hope the quiet carries you off quickly. Enjoy the game tomorrow.
